title: 安德鲁_突击
content_json: [{"key":"0.61276041660352516","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1123/h_580/50364/103682/2024/9/25/204857.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_944/h_691/50364/103682/2024/9/25/638926.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.2901012303f4a","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"安德鲁"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者安德鲁，身份编码E01-052132，Re-A芯片状态稳定，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"安德鲁是伊吉斯安全公司的安全顾问兼雇员教官，曾服役于E.O.S.特别行动队，看上去是一名典型到不能再典型的雇佣保镖。作为前特勤部队成员，安德鲁熟练掌握各种常见的武器，会根据雇主的需求采取不同的安保策略。但现在，他响应了协会的征召，协助超链者执行各种任务。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"只不过由于习惯，安德鲁至今仍穿着那身饱经风霜的战术护甲，并且从不摘下头盔一一恐怕根本没人知道他究竟长什么样，每当提起他的时候，大家不约而同想到的都是那副护甲面具。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"R"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"理"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/157597/2024/3/26/483054.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","vertica :""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/364402.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【伊吉斯安全公司应该给安德鲁发全勤奖。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伊吉斯安全公司专注于为艾尔特利斯的客户提供异格者安保雇佣服务，是一家颇具规模的私人安保企业。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"安德鲁属于公司里最勤奋的那类人。公司全勤纪录保持者、连续三年任务完成数排名第一、年度加班冠军的有力竞争者……即使前一天在安保任务中负伤，他也会在第二天继续出现在训练室里。这些勤奋刻苦的行为让安德鲁成为不少同事茶余饭后的谈资。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"当然了，每当这个时候，最激动的还得是训练室清洁工。每次工作间隙，他都会反戴帽子，声泪俱下地控诉安德鲁如何让他被迫加班。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而罪魁祸首，这种时候一般都会蹲在一条小河边，静静地钓鱼。想必这是为数不多的，能让安德鲁放松的方式——至于能不能钓到鱼，或者钓上来的是鱼还是别的什么，这就全凭运气了。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【总有一天你会知道，队伍里有一个会做饭的人是多么幸运的事。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"安德鲁的钓鱼技术可能一般，但他做鱼的技术绝对是一流的。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"据说某天深夜，伊吉斯安全公司接到了一项重要任务，全公司上上下下都因此加班到深夜。当忙碌了一天的员工们返回公司时，附近的饭馆早就都打烊了。疲惫大家已经没力气再做法了，只好计划着等到天亮再去找点东西吃。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"然而，当大家都准备空着肚子入睡的时候，走廊上竟然飘起了诱人的食物香味。肚子饿得咕咕叫的众人顺着香味找过去，发现香味源自员工宿舍的公共厨房，而厨房里站着一副拿着锅、系着围裙的战术护甲。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"呃，准确的说，是拿着锅、穿着战术护甲，并在护甲外面又套了围裙的安德鲁。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"安德鲁手中的锅里正是香味的源头一一一锅咸淡正好、色香味俱全的炖鱼。望着炖鱼，大家的眼泪不争气地从嘴角流了下来，而安德鲁也没有吝惜，又迅速地烧好了一桌子菜，和同事们分享。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我愿意为了这顿饭原谅他强迫我加班的事！」一一五星美食家兼伊吉斯安全公司训练室清洁工如是说。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【当然了，那副战术护甲偶尔也会带来麻烦……】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"就算是那个铁人一样的安德鲁，偶尔也会有情绪低落的时候。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"据伊吉斯安全公司的后勤负责人说，安德鲁有一天突然找到她，询问有没有适合他的服装尺码的新式护甲。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"后勤负责人惊讶极了，毕竟在她看来，安德鲁的战术护甲就仿佛他的第二层皮肤，从不离身。后勤负责人实在想不出，究竟是由于什么原因，才会让安德鲁萌生出换新护甲的念头。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在后勤负责人的再三追问下，安德鲁终于吞吞吐吐地说出了原因——原来那天早些时候，安德鲁跟着超链者前去执行清理源病毒的任务，但任务地点有不少感染者是熔断警察。在和感染者的战斗中，由于安德鲁的战术护甲和一些感染者的装备十分想死，有好几次其他异格者都错将他当成了敌人，这才让他动了换一身新护甲、减少这种情况发生的想法。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"后勤负责人当然全力支持安德鲁的想法，她找出了好几身全新的战术护甲让安德鲁一—一尝试。然而，安德鲁早就习惯了旧式护甲的各种细节，在换上那些新护甲后，很难快速适应，甚至因为更换护甲导致的重心改变，在训练中好几次险些摔倒甚至出现危险情况。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"迫不得已，安德鲁只好情绪低落地换回了那身旧护甲。不过，后勤负责人相信，再过不久，合作带来的默契就能很快消除这种误会……大概吧？"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"坦克"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性暴击，爆伤，爆伤 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色核心是通过被动震怒提升大招石破天惊的伤害，叠满后可以打出爆炸伤害"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12浴血+8时光驾驭+6讯光天击"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胡狼"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_551/h_445/50364/842288/2025/7/18/57014.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"TlvfswUKKInIQanS","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
